# Competitive Signal Report — Enterprise AI Platform (Monday, 20 July 2026)

> **Bottom line:** Competitors are focusing on expanding AI capabilities and partnerships, but significant gaps remain in enterprise-grade governance, true omnichannel, and predictable TCO, presenting clear opportunities for Kore.ai's validated platform. Salesforce's Agentforce continues to grapple with pricing complexity and analyst validation, while Five9 faces structural threats to its seat-based model.

## Three signals that matter

### Salesforce Agentforce's continued pricing and validation struggles
**What happened —** Salesforce's Agentforce product maturity is being questioned due to weak customer traction, with KeyBanc citing concerns about its effectiveness. Additionally, Live Nation is reportedly piloting Agentforce for on-demand festival expertise and personalized planning, indicating a continued push into specific use cases despite broader product maturity questions. [cio.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxPR3FnWkdmNEtvOXlhTTRsQTBLb0d1OUw2bE5UYXhlQkdtdWZsUldXSzdaUVp1T3huNk52NUpRekhuTjdleU9qUG9VR1otNkRHQ2c0R3pWOW8tNXAycERPUkxVcUgtVDgtbVAwRTZSSUVGYkdFVUJPTWJSR0NMQWtibXlNeWktT0xON3ByZlN0YnQtbDRYcUUwai1JOEc5TFhYU292NkF4T2Q1WkdEa2QzZ0x0aFRxcERhcEVtTkZvQThTY3ZBS0NMYzhtOA?oc=5) (2026-07-17)
**What it means for Kore.ai —** This reinforces Kore.ai's advantage in offering a mature, analyst-validated platform with predictable, per-resolution pricing, directly contrasting with Agentforce's ongoing struggles with customer traction and pricing model evolution.

### Five9 leadership changes signal strategic pivot amid market pressure
**What happened —** Five9 has appointed new leaders in Technology, Sales, and Strategy, signaling a potential shift in its go-to-market and product development focus as it navigates market pressures. [thekeyexecutives.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxOZVpaaFdQZXNvTFZpQ0d4VXZQR0E0MThBQUtzNVFjOVBwYTlocXpuR3Q0blNCYWpSakhfQUNpTVB2XzNpLW1zaWtVRnhadEJnUkxoeWdtQThtR0d1OTFGQjE2d204SkR2RzlQQlhxOTh4RWVaenFIZllJZ0QtemQzNzk2aGwzUElfMExraENRcHEySG1IcnhoMkFiQ2RMWms?oc=5) (2026-07-17)
**What it means for Kore.ai —** This leadership reshuffle at Five9, coupled with their ongoing challenges with a seat-based model under AI pressure, presents an opportunity to highlight Kore.ai's outcome-based pricing and robust AI capabilities that are designed for true deflection and efficiency, not just agent augmentation.

### Glean expands AI reach through LTM partnership
**What happened —** Glean is partnering with LTM to help enterprises scale AI with trusted business knowledge, aiming to unlock enterprise AI value through this collaboration. [The Times of India](https://news.google.?oc=5) (2026-07-19)
**What it means for Kore.ai —** While Glean focuses on internal knowledge management, this partnership highlights the broader enterprise trend towards AI adoption. Kore.ai can leverage this by emphasizing its proven CX-native AI platform, which is purpose-built for customer interactions and offers superior governance and omnichannel capabilities compared to horizontal knowledge-search tools.

## Signal priority table

| Competitor | Move (dated) | Threat | Kore.ai counter |
|---|---|---|---|
| Agentforce (Salesforce) | (2026-07-17) Product maturity questioned due to weak customer traction; piloted by Live Nation [cio.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiywFBVV95cUxPR3FnWkdmNEtvOXlhTTRsQTBLb0d1OUw2bE5UYXhlQkdtdWZsUldXSzdaUVp1T3huNk52NUpRekhuTjdleU9qUG9VR1otNkRHQ2c0R3pWOW8tNXAycERPUkxVcUgtVDgtbVAwRTZSSUVGYkdFVUJPTWJSR0NMQWtibXlNeWktT0xON3ByZlN0YnQtbDRYcUUwai1JOEc5TFhYU292NkF4T2Q1WkdEa2QzZ0x0aFRxcERhcEVtTkZvQThTY3ZBS0NMYzhtOA?oc=5) | High | Proven analyst leadership & deterministic ABL vs. pricing/traction issues |
| Five9 | (2026-07-17) Appointed new Technology, Sales, and Strategy Leaders [thekeyexecutives.com](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMinwFBVV95cUxOZVpaaFdQZXNvTFZpQ0d4VXZQR0E0MThBQUtzNVFjOVBwYTlocXpuR3Q0blNCYWpSakhfQUNpTVB2XzNpLW1zaWtVRnhadEJnUkxoeWdtQThtR0d1OTFGQjE2d204SkR2RzlQQlhxOTh4RWVaenFIZllJZ0QtemQzNzk2aGwzUElfMExraENRcHEySG1IcnhoMkFiQ2RMWms?oc=5) | Med | Highlight outcome-based pricing & true omnichannel vs. seat-model risk |
| Glean | (2026-07-19) Partnered with LTM to scale AI with trusted business knowledge [The Times of India](https://news.google.?oc=5) | Low | Emphasize CX-native, voice-capable platform vs. internal knowledge focus |

## Watch for
*   Continued analyst scrutiny on Salesforce Agentforce's enterprise adoption and product roadmap.
*   Any concrete product integration announcements or strategic shifts from Five9's new leadership team.
*   Further expansion of Glean's "Work AI" into adjacent enterprise functions, and whether it attempts to cross into customer-facing applications.

## Recommended actions
*   Arm Sales with messaging that highlights Kore.ai's **analyst-validated leadership** in conversational AI for CX, directly contrasting with competitors like Salesforce Agentforce that lack this independent validation.
*   Emphasize Kore.ai's **deterministic ABL and outcome-based pricing** as key differentiators against competitors like Salesforce Agentforce and Five9, which are struggling with pricing predictability and seat-based model limitations.
*   Reinforce Kore.ai's **true omnichannel capabilities** (voice and digital) in conversations with prospects evaluating voice-first or primarily digital solutions like Glean's focus.
*   Continue to monitor Five9's strategic direction under new leadership for potential openings to position Kore.ai's more robust and scalable AI platform.
